title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Flipkart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
